title: Review the risks of changing Kernel design to be /vote-first in /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public. Identify which executable checks, docs, or launcher behaviors would break or become misleading if /kernel remains co-equal. Return prioritized findings and recommended test set. Do not edit...
summary_text: **Prioritized findings** 1. **P0: CI/static contracts currently enforce `/kernel` as first-class entrypoint; true `/vote-first` will fail until these are changed.** Evidence: kernel contract assertions in [scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:248](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:248), [scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:317](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:317), and CI gate step [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:303](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:303). Runtime smoke harness is `/kernel`-centric in [tests/test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:98](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:98). 2. **P0: Launcher behavior is operationally kernel-first, not vote-first.** Plain `codex` auto-routes to `kernel` in repo context ([scripts/local/launchers/codex-orchestrator.zsh:196](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/codex-orchestrator.zsh:196)). `kernel` launcher prefers `k open`/`k new`/guard before any vote path ([scripts/local/launchers/kernel:38](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/kernel:38), [scripts/local/launchers/kernel:53](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/kernel:53)). Tests lock this in ([tests/test-codex-orchestrator-snippet.sh:59](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-codex-orchestrator-snippet.sh:59), [tests/test-kernel-launcher-template.sh:62](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-launcher-template.sh:62)). 3. **P1: `/vote` contract is continuation-only and weaker lane floor (2 lanes), so keeping `/kernel` co-equal masks policy drift and risks under-parallel execution.** `/vote` prompt says continuation of existing state and `>=2` lanes ([.codex/prompts/vote.md:18](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/vote.md:18), [.codex/prompts/vote.md:27](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/vote.md:27)); this is enforced by check ([scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:118](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:118)). Kernel prompt requires 6+ lanes and flags de-parallelization as violation ([.codex/prompts/kernel.md:58](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md:58), [.codex/prompts/kernel.md:60](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md:60)). 4. **P1: Phase-gate can synthesize `local-vote` evidence from runtime without explicit `/vote`, making vote-first claims non-verifiable.** Auto-backfill path: [scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh:120](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh:120). Current test expects this behavior ([tests/test-kernel-phase-gate.sh:56](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-phase-gate.sh:56)). 5. **P2: Docs are split between kernel-first local startup and vote-only trusted start signals, which becomes misleading if `/kernel` stays co-equal.** Kernel-first docs: [CODEX.md:19](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md:19), [CODEX.md:93](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md:93), [README.md:568](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/README.md:568). Vote-only trusted start signals in runtime/governance: [docs/kernel-unattended-runtime-substrate.md:47](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel-unattended-runtime-substrate.md:47), [fugue-task-router.yml:131](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-task-router.yml:131), [fugue-task-router.yml:185](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-task-router.yml:185), [scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh:70](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-reconciler.sh:70). 6. **P2: Installer/test foo...
